name: Night Stones
short_description: You awake in Mythica, a cozy island where magical stones change day to night. Explore winding paths or venture into the wilds with your trusty glider and sailboat. To return home, you must befriend quirky townsfolk, discover hidden treasures, master magic, and face enemies in clever puzzle combat.
detailed_description:
Night Stones is a cozy adventure game filled with vibrant characters, fun puzzles, and a heartfelt story. Awakening in a world you once dreamed of, you’re met with a portal that suddenly explodes, leaving you stranded. Your main quest: rebuild the portal and find your way back home. Create your own character and unveil the secrets of Mythica as well as your own character's past in this wholesome journey of self discovery.

Explore freely in this cozy open world adventure. Immerse yourself in a handcrafted island teeming with unique quests, quirky characters, and an emotional story. Glide from mountain peaks, sail through storms, and uncover hidden treasures in the Underworld. Discover new items, from an elemental wand to a humble stick, each bringing you one step closer to home.

As you explore the vast world, you'll encounter a colorful cast of quirky characters, each with their own personalities, habits, and secrets. Some will welcome you warmly, offering guidance or useful items, while others are more guarded, wary of newcomers. To earn their trust, you'll need to help with their unique challenges—maybe fetching a lost item, solving a small puzzle, or simply showing kindness. These encounters reveal hidden paths, lore, and clues about your journey. Building bonds with these characters not only helps you find your way home but also makes you feel truly connected to the world around you.

Engage in puzzle combat. Victory isn’t achieved through raw power or quick reflexes. It requires clever thinking and keen observation. Each encounter presents a unique challenge that can only be overcome by using your items in creative ways or by taking advantage of hidden aspects of your surroundings.
